title: Crocodile Is Driven Back
description: On pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this part focuses on crocodile’s plan begins to collapse. The fight around the royal tomb and the capital reaches its breaking point as Crocodile loses control of both the battlefield and his secrets.
scene: This scene belongs to the Crocodile’s Plan Begins to Collapse sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Vivi, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is this everything this country is hiding...?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I showed you every- thing as promised...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: A fitting place for a state secret.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ...So is this a poneglyph, Nice Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: In year239 of the Heaven's Calendar...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: There is only history written here.

summary: The fight around the royal tomb and the capital reaches its breaking point as Crocodile loses control of both the battlefield and his secrets.
